title: Sui Bridge - Open App
meta_description: sui bridge routes you to the official app for moving supported ETH, WETH, WBTC, LBTC, or USDT between Ethereum and Sui.
hero_h2: Move assets between Ethereum and the Sui network
hero_lead: Sui Bridge is the native Sui network route for moving supported assets between Ethereum and Sui through the official app, with transfers governed by Sui validators.
trust: Supported assets listed in Sui docs
what_is: Sui Bridge is Sui's native bridge for moving supported tokens between Sui and other networks; the official documentation describes supported assets, package IDs, contract addresses, source code, audits, and limits.

how.d: Open the app, select the source network and destination network, then connect the wallets required for that route.
Pick a supported token, enter the amount, and review the app details before approving anything.
Approve the token if required, then sign the source-chain transaction in your wallet.
Follow the bridge status in the app and verify the destination balance before making another move.

points.p: Built for the Sui network and operated by Sui validators, with governance handled by validator voting.
The docs list WBTC, LBTC, ETH, WETH, and USDT as supported assets; availability can still depend on direction and app state.
Start from Sui's official site or bridge.sui.io, then confirm token, wallet, and network details before signing.

faq.a: Sui Bridge is the native Sui bridge for moving supported assets between Sui and other networks through the official app at bridge.sui.io.

faq.q: Is Sui Bridge the official app?
faq.a: Yes, Sui documentation points users to bridge.sui.io for the native bridge experience; always verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: What assets does Sui Bridge support?
faq.a: Sui docs list WBTC, LBTC, ETH, WETH, and USDT as supported assets, though available routes can vary by direction and app state.
Sui Bridge is operated and governed by Sui validators, and bridge actions require validator signatures with a threshold of voting power.

faq.q: How do I verify Sui Bridge contracts?
faq.a: Use the contract and address links in the official docs, including the Ethereum bridge contract, before relying on copied addresses.

footer_note: This page is not the official app; verify bridge.sui.io before connecting a wallet. Educational content only, not financial advice.
